example: She was hired to assist the manager with daily administrative tasks.
exampleZh: 她被雇用来协助经理处理日常行政事务。

example: If the symptoms persist for more than a week, you should see a doctor.
exampleZh: 如果症状持续超过一周，你应该去看医生。

example: The team consists of five experienced engineers and two designers.
exampleZh: 这个团队由五名经验丰富的工程师和两名设计师组成。

example: Her performance has been remarkably consistent throughout the entire season.
exampleZh: 她在整个赛季中的表现一直非常稳定一致。

example: The company plans to resume production after the safety inspection is completed.
exampleZh: 公司计划在安全检查完成后恢复生产。

example: I presume you have already discussed this matter with your supervisor.
exampleZh: 我推测你已经和你的主管讨论过这件事了。

example: We cannot assume that every customer will be satisfied with the new policy.
exampleZh: 我们不能假设每位客户都会对新政策感到满意。

example: This old air conditioner consumes a large amount of electricity every day.
exampleZh: 这台旧空调每天消耗大量的电力。

example: The manager came over to assure us that the project was on schedule.
exampleZh: 经理过来向我们保证项目正在按计划进行。

example: You should insure your valuable belongings before moving to a new city.
exampleZh: 在搬到新城市之前，你应该给你的贵重物品投保。

example: Please check all the doors and windows to ensure the building is secure.
exampleZh: 请检查所有的门窗以确保大楼安全。

example: The store offers a money-back guarantee if you are not fully satisfied.
exampleZh: 如果您不完全满意，本店提供退款保证。

example: The monthly insurance premium for the new car is about two hundred dollars.
exampleZh: 这辆新车的月保险费大约是两百美元。

example: He invested a large portion of his savings in the stock market last year.
exampleZh: 他去年将大部分积蓄投资到了股票市场。

example: The company went bankrupt after failing to pay its debts for several months.
exampleZh: 这家公司在几个月未能偿还债务后宣告破产。

example: A sudden power failure disrupted the live broadcast of the important event.
exampleZh: 突然的停电中断了这一重要活动的现场直播。

example: The volcano could erupt at any moment, so residents were urgently evacuated.
exampleZh: 火山随时可能喷发，因此居民被紧急疏散。

example: Please do not interrupt the speaker while she is presenting her research findings.
exampleZh: 在演讲者展示她的研究成果时，请不要打断她。

example: The corrupt officials were eventually exposed by an investigative journalist.
exampleZh: 这些腐败官员最终被一名调查记者揭露。

example: He was arrested for attempting to offer a bribe to the government inspector.
exampleZh: 他因试图向政府检查员行贿而被逮捕。

example: Some researchers claim that this new drug can effectively treat the disease.
exampleZh: 一些研究人员声称这种新药可以有效治疗这种疾病。

example: The president stood before the nation to proclaim a new era of economic reform.
exampleZh: 总统站在全国人民面前宣布经济改革的新时代。

example: They worked hard to reclaim the desert land and turn it into fertile farmland.
exampleZh: 他们努力开垦沙漠土地，将其变为肥沃的农田。

example: The children could not help but exclaim with joy when they saw the presents.
exampleZh: 孩子们看到礼物时忍不住高兴地叫了起来。

example: The young author's debut novel received widespread critical acclaim around the world.
exampleZh: 这位年轻作家的处女作小说在世界各地获得了广泛的评论界赞誉。

example: The actor stood on the stage and began to declaim a famous Shakespearean monologue.
exampleZh: 那位演员站在舞台上，开始朗诵一段著名的莎士比亚独白。

example: After hours of questioning, the suspect finally decided to confess to the crime.
exampleZh: 经过数小时的审问，嫌疑人终于决定坦白罪行。

example: Teaching is a noble profession that requires great patience and dedication.
exampleZh: 教学是一项需要极大耐心和奉献精神的高尚职业。

example: Reading and gardening are the two hobbies that occupy most of her free time.
exampleZh: 阅读和园艺是占据她大部分空闲时间的两个爱好。

example: The witness was able to identify the suspect from a series of photographs.
exampleZh: 目击者能够从一系列照片中辨认出嫌疑人。

example: The factory increased its monthly output by nearly twenty percent this quarter.
exampleZh: 这个季度工厂的月产量提高了近百分之二十。

example: She prepared for the job interview by researching the company and practicing answers.
exampleZh: 她通过研究公司和练习回答来为工作面试做准备。

example: The school decided to punish the students who were caught cheating on the exam.
exampleZh: 学校决定惩罚那些在考试中被抓到作弊的学生。

example: The company reported a triple increase in profits compared to the previous year.
exampleZh: 该公司报告称利润比上一年增长了三倍。

example: It is easy to overlook small details when you are working under tight deadlines.
exampleZh: 在紧迫的截止日期下工作时，很容易忽略小细节。

example: He may be an amateur photographer, but his pictures look highly professional.
exampleZh: 他可能是个业余摄影师，但他的照片看起来非常专业。

example: The citizens gathered to elect a new mayor for their growing city.
exampleZh: 市民们聚集在一起，为他们日益发展的城市选举一位新市长。

example: The new computer processor is powerful enough to handle complex scientific calculations.
exampleZh: 这种新的计算机处理器足够强大，可以处理复杂的科学计算。

example: There has been a gradual improvement in the patient's condition over the past week.
exampleZh: 在过去一周里，病人的状况有了逐步的改善。

example: After the heavy rain, the river began to overflow and flooded nearby streets.
exampleZh: 大雨过后，河水开始泛滥，淹没了附近的街道。

example: Hundreds of people perished in the earthquake that struck the coastal region.
exampleZh: 数百人在袭击沿海地区的地震中丧生。

example: The rebels plotted to overthrow the government and establish a new regime.
exampleZh: 叛乱分子密谋推翻政府并建立新政权。

example: Can you explain this medical term in language that a layman can understand easily?
exampleZh: 你能用外行也能容易理解的语言解释这个医学术语吗？

example: The two twins look almost identical, so it is hard to tell them apart.
exampleZh: 这两个双胞胎看起来几乎一模一样，所以很难区分他们。

example: The police are still trying to confirm the identity of the accident victim.
exampleZh: 警方仍在试图确认事故受害者的身份。

example: She is an intelligent student who always asks thoughtful questions during class discussions.
exampleZh: 她是一个聪明的学生，在课堂讨论中总是提出有深度的问题。

example: Reading challenging books is a great way to stimulate your intellectual development.
exampleZh: 阅读具有挑战性的书籍是激发智力发展的好方法。

example: The professor delivered an engaging lecture on the history of ancient civilizations.
exampleZh: 教授就古代文明史做了一场引人入胜的讲座。

example: My grandfather used to collect rare stamps from many different countries around the world.
exampleZh: 我祖父过去常常收集来自世界许多不同国家的稀有邮票。

example: She speaks Mandarin fluently, but her parents still communicate in their local dialect.
exampleZh: 她的普通话说得很流利，但她的父母仍然用当地方言交流。

example: The negotiations did not yield any significant results after three long days of discussion.
exampleZh: 经过三天漫长的讨论，谈判没有产生任何重大结果。

example: Despite the current difficulties, the economic outlook for next year remains fairly positive.
exampleZh: 尽管目前存在困难，明年的经济前景仍然相当乐观。

example: Her book provides valuable insight into the challenges faced by working mothers today.
exampleZh: 她的书提供了关于当今职场母亲所面临挑战的宝贵见解。

example: They had a heated argument about how to allocate the limited budget for the project.
exampleZh: 他们就如何分配项目有限的预算发生了激烈的争论。

example: Many critics regard this film as one of the greatest works of modern cinema.
exampleZh: 许多评论家将这部影片视为现代电影最伟大的作品之一。

example: The noise from the construction site began to interfere with our ability to concentrate.
exampleZh: 建筑工地的噪音开始干扰我们集中注意力的能力。

example: The teacher had to intervene when the argument between the two students escalated.
exampleZh: 当两个学生之间的争执升级时，老师不得不介入。

example: There was a short interval between the two musical performances for stage preparation.
exampleZh: 两场音乐表演之间有一个短暂间隔用来准备舞台。

example: Can you help me interpret these complex data charts from the latest market survey?
exampleZh: 你能帮我解读这些来自最新市场调查的复杂数据图表吗？

example: The scientist plans to publish her groundbreaking research in a leading medical journal.
exampleZh: 这位科学家计划在一本顶级医学期刊上发表她的突破性研究。

example: If you multiply the length by the width, you will get the total area of the room.
exampleZh: 如果你用长度乘以宽度，就能得到房间的总面积。

example: A multitude of fans gathered outside the stadium to cheer for their favorite team.
exampleZh: 大量球迷聚集在体育场外，为他们最喜欢的球队加油。

example: We should not waste time arguing about trivial matters that do not really matter.
exampleZh: 我们不应该浪费时间争论那些无关紧要的琐碎事情。

example: The clinical trial showed that the new vaccine is safe and highly effective.
exampleZh: 临床试验表明，这种新疫苗安全且非常有效。

example: The company launched a new product that quickly became popular among young consumers.
exampleZh: 该公司推出了一款新产品，迅速在年轻消费者中流行起来。

example: The scientist's discovery had a profound impact on our understanding of the universe.
exampleZh: 这位科学家的发现对我们理解宇宙产生了深远的影响。

example: The amount of paperwork on her desk seemed to overwhelm the new employee completely.
exampleZh: 桌上的文件数量似乎让这位新员工完全不知所措。

example: The overall performance of the team has been very impressive throughout the tournament.
exampleZh: 这支队伍在整个锦标赛中的总体表现令人印象深刻。

example: At the end of the meeting, the chairperson gave a brief summary of the key decisions.
exampleZh: 会议结束时，主席简要总结了关键决定。

example: He donated a large sum of money to help rebuild the damaged school in the village.
exampleZh: 他捐了一大笔钱帮助重建村里受损的学校。

example: The employees were asked to work overtime to meet the approaching project deadline.
exampleZh: 员工们被要求加班以赶上即将到来的项目截止日期。

example: The company has experienced steady growth over the past three consecutive years.
exampleZh: 该公司在过去连续三年中经历了稳定的增长。

example: The chemist mixed two compounds together and observed a dramatic color change in the solution.
exampleZh: 化学家将两种化合物混合在一起，观察到溶液中发生了剧烈的颜色变化。

example: She had to overcome many obstacles before finally achieving her dream of becoming a doctor.
exampleZh: 她必须克服许多障碍，才最终实现了成为一名医生的梦想。

example: The patient is now in a stable condition after the successful emergency surgery.
exampleZh: 在成功的紧急手术之后，病人现在状况稳定。

example: A solid foundation in mathematics is essential for advanced studies in engineering.
exampleZh: 扎实的数学基础对于工程学的高级研究至关重要。

example: The small startup became an overnight success after its product went viral online.
exampleZh: 这家小型创业公司在其产品在网上走红后一夜成名。

example: They plan to establish a new research center to study renewable energy solutions.
exampleZh: 他们计划建立一个新的研究中心来研究可再生能源解决方案。

example: Adding too many unnecessary features will only complicate the design of the product.
exampleZh: 添加太多不必要的功能只会使产品的设计复杂化。

example: I suggest you reserve a table at the restaurant since it gets very busy on weekends.
exampleZh: 我建议你在餐厅预订一张桌子，因为那里周末非常繁忙。

example: The scientist spent hours observing the behavior of the animals in their natural habitat.
exampleZh: 这位科学家花了数小时观察动物在其自然栖息地的行为。

example: We should try to conserve water and electricity whenever possible to protect the environment.
exampleZh: 我们应该尽可能地节约用水和用电以保护环境。

example: Your passport must be valid for at least six months before you travel abroad.
exampleZh: 在你出国旅行之前，你的护照必须至少有六个月的有效期。

example: If any unexpected problems arise during the experiment, please notify the supervisor immediately.
exampleZh: 如果实验过程中出现任何意外问题，请立即通知主管。

example: The two cars collided at the intersection because one driver ran the red light.
exampleZh: 两辆车在十字路口相撞，因为其中一名司机闯了红灯。

example: It was a bold decision to invest all of their savings in a completely new venture.
exampleZh: 将他们所有的积蓄投资于一个全新的项目是一个大胆的决定。

example: The young couple decided to explore the ancient city on foot during their holiday.
exampleZh: 这对年轻夫妇决定在假期里徒步探索这座古城。

example: He promised to repay the loan within two years after starting his new business.
exampleZh: 他承诺在开始新生意后两年内还清贷款。

example: The prices of fresh vegetables tend to fluctuate depending on the season and weather conditions.
exampleZh: 新鲜蔬菜的价格往往会根据季节和天气条件而波动。

example: The young athlete managed to overtake his rivals in the final lap of the race.
exampleZh: 这位年轻运动员在比赛的最后一圈成功超越了他的对手。

example: The large corporation continues to dominate the global smartphone market this year.
exampleZh: 这家大型企业今年继续主导着全球智能手机市场。

example: The country has to import a large portion of its oil to meet domestic energy demands.
exampleZh: 该国不得不进口大量石油以满足国内能源需求。

example: The teacher used a gentle but firm tone when speaking to the misbehaving student.
exampleZh: 老师用温和但坚定的语气对那个行为不端的学生说话。

example: The parking ticket was declared invalid because the officer had written the wrong date.
exampleZh: 这张停车罚单被宣布无效，因为警察写错了日期。

example: The committee decided to adopt a new strategy to address the growing environmental concerns.
exampleZh: 委员会决定采用一项新策略来应对日益增长的环境问题。

example: There was a violent clash between protesters and police in the city center yesterday.
exampleZh: 昨天市中心发生了抗议者与警察之间的激烈冲突。

example: The bank approved their loan application, so they can finally buy a new house.
exampleZh: 银行批准了他们的贷款申请，所以他们终于可以买新房了。

example: The stock market crash of 2008 had serious consequences for the global economy.
exampleZh: 2008年的股市崩盘对全球经济产生了严重后果。

example: The complicated instructions seemed to confuse most of the people in the room.
exampleZh: 复杂的指示似乎让房间里的大多数人感到困惑。

example: The advertisement was designed to mislead consumers about the actual benefits of the product.
exampleZh: 该广告旨在误导消费者对产品实际功效的认识。

example: The snake's venom is highly deadly and can kill a human within just a few hours.
exampleZh: 这种蛇的毒液非常致命，可以在短短几小时内致人死亡。

example: The city built a new pedestrian overpass to help people cross the busy highway safely.
exampleZh: 市政府新建了一座人行天桥，帮助人们安全地穿过繁忙的高速公路。

example: The government introduced new policies to stimulate domestic consumption and economic growth.
exampleZh: 政府出台了新政策以刺激国内消费和经济增长。

example: According to the weather forecast, it will rain heavily throughout the entire weekend.
exampleZh: 根据天气预报，整个周末将会有大雨。

example: The country hopes to export more agricultural products to international markets this year.
exampleZh: 该国希望今年向国际市场出口更多的农产品。

example: You worked extremely hard on this project and truly deserve all the recognition you get.
exampleZh: 你在这个项目上努力工作了，完全值得你得到的所有认可。

example: She became fluent in three foreign languages after studying abroad for several years.
exampleZh: 在国外留学几年后，她能够流利地使用三种外语。

example: The earthquake was the worst natural disaster the region had experienced in over a century.
exampleZh: 这场地震是该地区一个多世纪以来经历的最严重的自然灾害。

example: We knew from the outset that this would be an extremely challenging and risky project.
exampleZh: 我们从一开始就知道这将是一个极具挑战性和风险的项目。

example: She is widely regarded as one of the foremost experts in the field of genetics.
exampleZh: 她被广泛认为是遗传学领域最重要的专家之一。

example: The new portable speaker is small enough to fit in your bag and take anywhere.
exampleZh: 这款新的便携式音箱小到可以放进包里随身携带。

example: The actor decided to sue the magazine for publishing false and damaging statements about him.
exampleZh: 这位演员决定起诉那家杂志，因为其发表了关于他的虚假和诽谤性言论。

example: He started going bald in his early twenties, so he decided to shave his head completely.
exampleZh: 他二十出头就开始秃顶了，所以他决定把头发全部剃光。

example: She grew up in an affluent neighborhood where most families owned large houses and luxury cars.
exampleZh: 她在一个富裕的社区长大，那里大多数家庭都拥有大房子和豪车。

example: No one could predict the outcome of the election until the very last moment.
exampleZh: 直到最后一刻，没有人能预测选举的结果。

example: The documentary aims to portray the daily struggles of farmers living in remote mountain villages.
exampleZh: 这部纪录片旨在描绘生活在偏远山村的农民们的日常挣扎。

example: The jury took only two hours to convict the defendant of all the charges.
exampleZh: 陪审团只用了两个小时就裁定被告所有罪名成立。

example: Some factory owners were accused of trying to exploit workers by paying extremely low wages.
exampleZh: 一些工厂主被指控试图通过支付极低的工资来剥削工人。

example: After three weeks of testimony, the jury finally reached a unanimous verdict in the case.
exampleZh: 经过三周的证词，陪审团最终就该案达成了一致裁决。

example: The government is working on new legislation to better protect consumer data and privacy.
exampleZh: 政府正在制定新的法规以更好地保护消费者数据和隐私。

example: The mysterious story immediately aroused the curiosity of the children sitting in the room.
exampleZh: 这个神秘的故事立刻激起了坐在房间里孩子们的好奇心。

example: We must do everything we can to preserve these ancient historical sites for future generations.
exampleZh: 我们必须尽一切努力为子孙后代保护这些古代历史遗迹。

example: The reservoir provides drinking water for more than two million people in the surrounding area.
exampleZh: 这座水库为周边地区两百多万人提供饮用水。

example: She had to refuse the job offer because it would require her to relocate overseas.
exampleZh: 她不得不拒绝了那份工作邀请，因为那需要她搬到海外。

example: The essential oil slowly began to diffuse throughout the room, creating a relaxing atmosphere.
exampleZh: 精油慢慢开始在整个房间扩散，营造出一种放松的氛围。

example: Social media has a huge influence on how young people form their opinions these days.
exampleZh: 如今，社交媒体对年轻人形成观点的方式有着巨大的影响。

example: The new policy had an immediate and positive impact on the local economy and employment.
exampleZh: 新政策对当地经济和就业产生了立竿见影的积极影响。

example: He had the misfortune of losing his job just a few months after buying a new house.
exampleZh: 他很不幸地在买了新房几个月后就失去了工作。

example: The little boy was always getting into mischief when his mother was not watching him.
exampleZh: 这个小男孩总是在妈妈没注意的时候捣蛋。

example: Constant criticism from colleagues can seriously undermine a person's self-confidence over time.
exampleZh: 来自同事的不断批评会随着时间的流逝严重削弱一个人的自信心。

example: The research team is about to undertake a comprehensive study on climate change effects.
exampleZh: 该研究团队即将开展一项关于气候变化影响的全面研究。

example: Before writing the essay, she created a clear outline to organize all her main ideas.
exampleZh: 在写文章之前，她创建了一个清晰的大纲来组织所有的主要想法。

example: The sudden outbreak of the disease forced the government to declare a state of emergency.
exampleZh: 疾病的突然爆发迫使政府宣布进入紧急状态。

example: We need to work faster because the deadline for submitting the final report is next Friday.
exampleZh: 我们需要加快工作进度，因为提交最终报告的截止日期是下周五。

example: The shocking news story about the scandal made the front-page headline of every major newspaper.
exampleZh: 关于这起丑闻的惊人新闻故事登上了每家主要报纸的头版头条。

example: No one could foresee that such a small incident would lead to a major international crisis.
exampleZh: 没有人能预见到这样一件小事竟会酿成一场重大的国际危机。

example: She gently placed her hand on his forehead to check if he still had a fever.
exampleZh: 她轻轻地把手放在他的额头上，检查他是否还在发烧。

example: The instructions for assembling the furniture were very clear and straightforward to follow.
exampleZh: 组装家具的说明非常清晰且简单易懂。

example: The international company moved its global headquarters from New York to London last year.
exampleZh: 这家国际公司去年将其全球总部从纽约迁至伦敦。

example: A large portion of the budget was allocated to education and healthcare services this year.
exampleZh: 今年预算的很大一部分被分配给了教育和医疗服务。

example: The proportion of elderly people in the total population has been steadily increasing for decades.
exampleZh: 几十年来，老年人在总人口中的比例一直在稳步上升。

example: The contract includes a provision that allows either party to cancel within thirty days.
exampleZh: 合同中包含一项规定，允许任何一方在三十天内取消。

example: The two companies decided to consolidate their operations to reduce costs and improve efficiency.
exampleZh: 这两家公司决定合并业务以降低成本并提高效率。

example: The witness provided crucial information that helped the police solve the case quickly.
exampleZh: 目击者提供了关键信息，帮助警方迅速破案。

example: It took her a few months to adapt to the new working environment and company culture.
exampleZh: 她花了几个月的时间来适应新的工作环境和公司文化。

example: She is very adept at solving complex mathematical problems in a short amount of time.
exampleZh: 她非常擅长在短时间内解决复杂的数学问题。

example: I reckon it will take us about three hours to finish the remaining work today.
exampleZh: 我估计我们今天大约需要三个小时才能完成剩下的工作。

example: His reckless driving on the wet road nearly caused a serious accident last night.
exampleZh: 他昨晚在湿滑路面上鲁莽驾驶，差点造成严重事故。

example: The angry customer threatened to smash the broken device against the wall in frustration.
exampleZh: 这位愤怒的顾客威胁要把坏掉的设备往墙上摔以泄愤。

example: The fireworks will explode in the night sky to celebrate the start of the new year.
exampleZh: 烟花将在夜空中绽放以庆祝新年的到来。
